ValidationRule.description: When Type is Equipment, both the Equipment field and at least one related Equipment record are required to move to Submitted.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Submitted"), ISPICKVAL(Type, "Equipment"), OR( ISBLANK(Equipment__c), Equipment_Count__c = 0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Equipment field must be populated and at least one Equipment record must be linked to submit an Equipment deal.
